name: area/core-rust
description: Rust CLI, common crate, engine, tools, and proto bindings

name: area/gateway-go
description: Go gateway, connectors, scheduler, and operator scaffolding

name: area/security
description: Sandbox, policy, encryption, attestation, audit, and zero-trust changes

name: area/docs
description: Documentation, migration guidance, and contributor content

name: area/ui
description: Flutter UI and future frontend assets

name: type/connector
description: Connector support, adapter request, or integration gap

name: status/needs-triage
description: New issue waiting for maintainer or owner triage

name: status/needs-owner
description: Needs direct owner review because the area is sensitive or cross-cutting

name: status/blocked
description: Blocked on another issue, dependency, or maintainer decision

name: priority/p0
description: Critical breakage affecting stability or security

name: priority/p1
description: High-priority issue that should be addressed soon
